summary: **Role:** Fable build agent (designer-6), 2026-07-13. Increment-4 of the large-kernel domain-balance track. This PINS the spec for a **bounded, single-domain** first ingest that validates the full download→filter→type→decontaminate→emit pipeline off-box (Modal CPU). It is **kernel machinery, not a verdicted experiment** — no Law-1 freeze, no registry verdict. title: SCALE-1 S1 — bounded first-ingest pre-registration: Wikidata "position" domain
